title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings, structured output, etc.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models, multi-user, RBAC, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, streaming, embeddings, tools, Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + LangChain + Chroma; ingest PDFs/URLs and chat locally.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline code copilots with autocomplete and chat.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI with fuzzy finder, conversation history, syntax highlighting, and shell integration.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for end-to-end NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module example spinning up Ollama containers for CI-based LLM tests and benchmarks.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client for Ollama with dependency injection, streaming, and minimal API samples.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Native n8n node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows for summarization, translation, etc.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; small surface, context-aware, ideal for microservices.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers threads using local Ollama models with per-channel model preferences.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama with GenServer behavior for fault-tolerant LLM services.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated list of 150+ community-contributed model tags ready to pull and run via Ollama.
